recommendations.title: Commission independent third-party supply chain audit
recommendations.description: Engage ERM or equivalent to conduct a comprehensive audit of coal suppliers in Jharkhand by 2026-06-30, aligned with ETI Base Code and Sedex SMETA standards, to identify and remediate child labor risks, ensuring compliance with BRSR disclosure requirements (BRSR:P6:Q14) and avoiding SEBI penalties up to ₹50 Cr.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹50 Cr SEBI penalty and restore ₹5-10 Cr green procurement contracts
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Vedanta Resources 2020 commissioned ERM audit to recover ESG rating

audit_trail.value: ₹33.8 Cr exposure from child labor risk flagged
Independent supply chain audit by ERM led to rating recovery
Mandatory disclosure on supply chain labor practices

recommendations.title: Implement supplier remediation program with corrective timelines
recommendations.description: Develop and enforce zero-child-labor clauses across all 250+ coal suppliers by 2026-09-30, including corrective action plans and quarterly progress reporting to reduce reputational and regulatory risks, following Vedanta's precedent and SASB supply chain standards.
recommendations.profitability_link: Unlock ₹5-10 Cr green procurement contracts and avoid ₹50 Cr penalty
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Vedanta established zero-child-labor clause across 250+ suppliers
recommendations.roi_cap_reason: Capped at 200% (operational ceiling). Raw estimate was 300%; cap prevents over-claim.

audit_trail.ref: ₹33.8 Cr exposure from child labor risks

audit_trail.value: Zero-child-labor clause across suppliers improved ESG rating

recommendations.title: Engage civil society for stakeholder dialogue and redress
recommendations.description: Initiate quarterly stakeholder engagement sessions with NGOs and community leaders in Jharkhand starting 2026-05-31 to co-develop remediation plans and improve social license to operate, enhancing ESG ratings and DJSI inclusion prospects.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential 5-10% valuation premium via DJSI inclusion worth ₹50-100 Cr market cap uplift

audit_trail.value: Need for community redress and dialogue

recommendations.title: Establish anonymous worker-voice grievance mechanism
recommendations.description: Launch a confidential reporting platform for coal supply chain workers by 2026-07-31 to enable anonymous grievances on child labor and forced labor issues, improving transparency and stakeholder trust per GRI 408/409 guidelines.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reduce reputational damage risk and maintain ESG fund eligibility worth ₹5-10 Cr

audit_trail.ref: Child labor risks flagged in supply chain

audit_trail.value: Disclosure on child labor grievance mechanisms

immediate_high.title: Commission independent third-party supply chain audit
Implement supplier remediation program with corrective timelines
Engage civil society for stakeholder dialogue and redress
